headline: How The Alector (ALEC) Investment Story Is Shifting With Tau Readthroughs And BBB Shuttle Focus
summary: Alector’s updated analyst framework now points to a fair value move from US$2.88 to US$3.10, a modest shift that still signals a meaningful recalibration of expectations. This change is closely tied to how analysts are weighing CELIA’s readthrough for tau-targeting therapies and Alector’s pivot toward blood brain barrier shuttle based designs, balancing the scientific promise against execution risks and the memory of prior trial setbacks. As you read on, you will see how to track these moving...
